summary: Complete revised v4 implementation plan for Video Prompt Pipeline. Key changes in v4: (1) Step 2 splits into 2 API calls producing 2 files: characters JSON and visual bible JSON (locations), matching existing image pipeline pattern, (2) Final JSON in Step 4 includes character_labels for image reference, (3) Art style injection mechanism fully documented with 3 layers: Mandatory Style keywords, Negative Prompt, and Constraint files (safety + quality + historical), (4) Concrete example of how OverSimplified Cartoon style would be assembled into final prompt.
